directionValidation.reviewNote: Intermediate-axis warnings were accepted after labeled normal-size and ordered-loop review confirmed the intended quadrants without reversal.

visualDesign.face: satin-white ceramic face with dimensional eyelids, brows, and luminous cyan physical eyes
visualDesign.clothing: layered couture-like crystal armour with brushed-silver trims and recessed seams
visualDesign.wings: six bevelled translucent crystal wings with front, middle, and rear depth planes
visualDesign.lighting: consistent upper-left material response with controlled cyan emission

movementValidation.directionalTravel: graceful airborne glide with no foot-running
movementValidation.failedRowExtraction: stable-slots reviewed as stable and unclipped

continuity.reviewNote: Metric warnings were visually reviewed; no snap, scale pop, clipping, identity drift, or broken attachment was present.
